query:
SELECT s.id, s.originalName, s.status, s.pipelineStatus, s.rowCount, s.createdAt
FROM sessions s
JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id
WHERE u.username = 'weixuejian'
ORDER BY s.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user UpQ6nzGwi5FMPrH.root --database CRyFQH5qGudysyWQuRqoNj --execute 
SELECT s.id, s.originalName, s.status, s.pipelineStatus, s.rowCount, s.createdAt
FROM sessions s
JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id
WHERE u.username = 'weixuejian'
ORDER BY s.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
